title: B.Sc Jobs 2026 – Junior Research Fellow
shortInfo: NIT Mizoram Recruitment 2026: Apply online for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post. Last date to apply is 30 June 2026 through the official NIT Mizoram website.

basic_details.job_title: NIT Mizoram Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Mizoram Recruitment 2026: Apply online for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post. Last date to apply is 30 June 2026 through the official NIT Mizoram website.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the NIT Mizoram Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.details: Master degree (M.Tech/M.E/M.Sc.) in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Aerospace Engineering / Mathematics / Robotics / Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning / Data Science or relevant field with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CPI/CGPA in both M.Tech/M.E/M.Sc., and B.Tech/B.E/B.Sc. Desirable: good background in Mathematics and Programming in C/C++/Python

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Mizoram to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the NIT Mizoram Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Mizoram is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree (M.Tech/M.E/M.Sc.) in relevant fields like Computer Science, IT, ECE, Mechanical, Mathematics, etc., with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CPI/CGPA in both Master's and Bachelor's degrees.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Mizoram.

faq.question: What is the application fee for the NIT Mizoram JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is a contractual appointment.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: What is the location of NIT Mizoram?
faq.answer: NIT Mizoram is located in Aizawl, Mizoram, with the pincode 796012.
